note: 45-slot divergent schedule. slots[i-1] drives iteration i. Models: 1-25 luna(max), 26-35 sol(ultra), 36-45 glm(max). SOL/GLM directives are refined at the between-generation gates from actual findings; these are the pre-seeded defaults.

slots.directive: Find repos/frameworks implementing convergence vs divergent/broaden stopping, novelty/saturation stopping, diminishing-returns and oscillation detection. Map to runtime/convergence.
